title: Criminal investigation launched after 25 sled dogs found dead at Mat-Su kennel
summary: The Alaska State Troopers (AST) have launched a criminal animal cruelty investigation after 25 sled dogs were found dead at a property in the Matanuska-Susitna Borough (MSB), highlighting a horrific scene of suspected neglect and abandonment.

title: Socioeconomic status a key factor in understanding Alaska test data, lawmakers hear
summary: Statewide, about 33% of students tested at or above grade level expectations in language arts and 32% in math in 2025. Students in ninth grade demonstrated the greatest need for support in language arts and math.
